current_wind.description: Moderate wind from the South-Southwest, with strong gusts.

bh.shot_strategy: Use an understable disc for distance with a slight hyzer flip or gentle anhyzer to leverage the tailwind. Focus on a clean release.

fh.shot_strategy: Throw an understable disc on a slight hyzer to allow it to flip up and ride the tailwind. Keep it clean.

bh.shot_strategy: Use an understable disc for maximum distance with the tailwind. A slight anhyzer or hyzer flip will maximize glide.

fh.shot_strategy: A hyzer release with an understable disc will help it turn into the wind and carry further.

wind_info.description: Tailwind from behind and slightly to the right.

bh.shot_strategy: Leverage the tailwind with an understable disc for distance. Aim for a straighter flight path given the strong gusts.

fh.shot_strategy: A hyzer release with an understable disc is recommended to control the flight in the strong tailwind.

bh.shot_strategy: An understable disc on a smooth hyzer flip will maximize distance with this tailwind. Be mindful of the strong gusts.

fh.shot_strategy: Use an understable disc with a controlled hyzer release to take advantage of the tailwind.

bh.shot_strategy: Prefer a Forehand (FH). If Backhand (BH), throw a strong hyzer with an overstable disc to prevent it from turning over. Be prepared for the wind to push the disc left.

fh.shot_strategy: Throw an overstable disc on a hyzer angle to combat the strong crosswind from the right. Aim to keep the flight path straight or with a slight fade.

bh.shot_strategy: This wind pushes left, and LHBH naturally fades right. A straight or slight hyzer release with a stable disc should work well. Be aware of the wind's influence.

fh.shot_strategy: Prefer Forehand (FH). Throw an overstable disc on a hyzer to ensure it holds its line against the crosswind.

bh.shot_strategy: Throw Backhand (BH) with a hyzer angle to keep the disc from floating right. An overstable disc is recommended.

fh.shot_strategy: Forehand (FH) is a viable option. Use a stable disc with a controlled release.

bh.shot_strategy: Left Hand Backhand (LHBH) fades right, and this wind pushes right. This is a challenging wind for LHBH. Prefer Forehand (FH).

fh.shot_strategy: Throw an overstable disc on a hyzer to counteract the wind pushing from the left.

bh.shot_strategy: Backhand (BH) is manageable with a hyzer and an overstable disc to prevent drifting right.

fh.shot_strategy: Forehand (FH) is a good option. Use a stable disc with a controlled flat release.

bh.shot_strategy: Left Hand Backhand (LHBH) fades right, and this wind pushes right. This combination is difficult for LHBH. Prefer Forehand (FH).

fh.shot_strategy: Throw an overstable disc on a hyzer to keep it from drifting right with the wind.

fh.shot_strategy: Use an overstable disc on a hyzer angle to fight the crosswind from the right. Aim for a reliable fade left.
